observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with mechanical stress
Visual pattern suggesting wire bent at abnormal angle
Localized deviation from normal cable appearance
mechanism_explanation: Sustained or excessive mechanical loading causes permanent deformation.
severity_visual_description: moderate wire bent at abnormal angle visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Reduce applied force and verify fixture alignment.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the wire bent at abnormal angle would be absent and surface appears normal.
